name: env-audit
description: Environment variable and configuration audit. 8 dimensions (ENV1-ENV8): variable completeness, unused vars, startup validation, secret exposure, environment parity, type safety, default values, and documentation. Supports Node.js (.env/process.env), Python (os.environ/settings), and framework-specific patterns (Vite import.meta.env, Next.js NEXT_PUBLIC_). Switches: zuvo:env-audit full | [path] | --secrets-only | --parity
